mapper.select: SELECT * FROM answer_record ORDER BY answer_time DESC
SELECT * FROM answer_record WHERE record_id = #{recordId} ORDER BY answer_time
SELECT * FROM answer_record WHERE question_id = #{questionId} ORDER BY answer_time DESC
SELECT * FROM answer_record WHERE record_id = #{recordId} AND question_id = #{questionId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM answer_record WHERE record_id = #{recordId}
SELECT SUM(score) FROM answer_record WHERE record_id = #{recordId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO answer_record (record_id, question_id, student_answer, is_correct, score, answer_time) VALUES (#{recordId}, #{questionId}, #{studentAnswer}, #{isCorrect}, #{score}, #{answerTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE answer_record SET record_id = #{recordId}, question_id = #{questionId}, student_answer = #{studentAnswer}, is_correct = #{isCorrect}, score = #{score}, answer_time = #{answerTime} WHERE answer_id = #{answerId}
